mapper.sql: SELECT id, user_id, skill_definition_id, agent_id, tool_session_id, title, status, im_chat_id, created_at, last_active_at FROM skill_session
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM skill_session WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO skill_session (user_id, skill_definition_id, agent_id, tool_session_id, title, status, im_chat_id, created_at, last_active_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{skillDefinitionId}, #{agentId}, #{toolSessionId}, #{title}, #{status}, #{imChatId}, NOW(), NOW())
